Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Attendance At Properly Noticed Deposition, And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Attendance At Deposition and For Production Of Document is Granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks the deposition of the persons most knowledgeable as to the painting of the pedestrian crosswalk and the trimming and maintenance of the vegetation and foliage on the center island. The motion is denied as it seeks to compel the deposition of the person most knowledgeable about traffic collisions at the intersection of Bosworth Street and the I-280 on-ramp as it is overly broad and not the proper subject of a PMK deposition. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
